title: Chloothamnus schlechteri
taxonomy: Chloothamnus schlechteri is classified as a species within the genus Chloothamnus, which belongs to the family Pterobryaceae. The family Pterobryaceae is a part of the class Bryopsida, which is a subgroup of mosses. The order is Pterobryales. The class Bryopsida and the order Pterobryales are part of the division Bryophyta. This division is a subgroup of the larger plant kingdom, specifically within the phylum Bryophyta.
